name: Kai Pad Khiaowan (Chicken Stir-Fried with Green Curry
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Nam prik khiaowan (green curry paste)
3 tbsp Prik ki nu (green birdseye chilis), thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok or skillet, warm the coconut milk over medium heat until it becomes aromatic when added with the curry paste.
2. Discard any oil film that forms on the surface.
3. Add the chicken and stir fry until it just begins to change color.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (except the basil) and continue to stir fry until the chicken is almost cooked through.
5. Finally, add half the basil and stir briefly, then transfer to a serving platter.
6. Dip half the basil in sweet dipping sauce, and then fry it in hot oil until crispy.
7. Use this crispy basil garnish on top of the curry.
8. Serve with rice or noodles.
